scripts.dev: npm run _check-node && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run _check-node && cd server && npm run dev
scripts.dev:client: npm run _check-node && cd client && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm run _check-node && npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build:shared: npm run _check-node && cd shared && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: npm run _check-node && npm run build:shared && cd client && npm run build
scripts.build:static: npm run _check-node && npm run build:shared && cd client && npm run build:static
scripts.lint: npm run _check-node && cd shared && npx eslint . && cd ../client && npm run lint && cd ../server && npx eslint .
scripts.lint:fix: npm run _check-node && cd shared && npx eslint . --fix && cd ../client && npm run lint:fix && cd ../server && npx eslint . --fix
scripts.type-check: npm run _check-node && cd shared && npm run type-check && cd ../client && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:all: npm run _check-node && cd shared && npm test && cd ../client && npm test && cd ../server && npm test
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run _check-node && cd client && npm run deploy
